metadata.greeting: Get ready for an exciting weekend in London! I've found lots of free and engaging activities for your 3-year-old, including museum adventures and outdoor explorations. There are also some great events coming up in the following weeks that you can book in advance, so let's get planning!

activities.title: Library Club at the Hackney Showroom
activities.description: Reading corner with diverse book selection and pairing service.
activities.whyItWorks: Free, drop-in, and suitable for a wide age range, with a cosy reading corner perfect for toddlers.

transport.fromHackney: Various bus routes and Overground to Hackney Downs.
transport.tip: Check term times before heading out.

activities.title: Young V&A
activities.description: Interactive museum designed for children, with collections of toys, design and play areas.
activities.whyItWorks: Specifically designed for children, with lots of hands-on exhibits and space to explore. Mini Museum caters for under 2s.

transport.tip: Can get busy, so avoid peak hours.

activities.title: Biodiversity Playground
activities.description: A small, beautifully designed wooden playground with a sweet pond theme.
activities.whyItWorks: Designed for toddlers, this playground offers a safe and engaging space to play outdoors.

transport.fromHackney: Various bus routes to Stratford, then walk to the park.
transport.tip: Combine with a walk around the Olympic Park.

activities.title: Museum of London Docklands
activities.description: Learn about London's history as a port, with child-friendly exhibits and activities.
activities.whyItWorks: Designed with children in mind, with free activity sheets and hands-on activities. Mudlarks soft play area.

transport.tip: The museum is not too crowded.

activities.title: REPLAY: A Limitless Recycled Playground
activities.description: A play space made out of repurposed materials, encouraging invention and creativity.
activities.whyItWorks: Hands-on and interactive, allowing children to explore and play in a unique environment.

transport.tip: Check for special family events at the Southbank Centre.

activities.title: Discover Children's Story Centre
activities.description: Immersive play spaces and a story garden playground. Baby Storytelling plus crafts and singalong time for babies and toddlers.
activities.whyItWorks: Designed for young children, with lots of opportunities for imaginative play and storytelling.

transport.tip: Check the schedule for baby and toddler sessions.

activities.title: Queen Elizabeth Olympic Park
activities.description: Expansive park with playgrounds, green spaces, and walking trails.
activities.whyItWorks: Lots of space to run around and explore outdoors. Several playgrounds suitable for different ages.

transport.tip: Pack a picnic to enjoy in the park.

activities.title: Walthamstow Wetlands
activities.description: Nature reserve with walking trails and opportunities to spot wildlife.
activities.whyItWorks: Great for a nature walk and spotting birds and other animals. Flat paths suitable for pushchairs.

transport.tip: Check for special events and activities for children.

activities.title: Natural History Museum
activities.description: Explore dinosaurs, mammals, and other fascinating creatures.
activities.whyItWorks: Dinosaurs are a big hit with toddlers. Free and lots to see. Volcanoes and Earthquakes gallery.

transport.tip: Visit early or late to avoid crowds.

activities.title: Science Museum
activities.description: Interactive exhibits exploring science and technology.
activities.whyItWorks: The Garden in the basement (Tues-Sun) is an interactive space for younger children.

transport.tip: Check for family-friendly shows and demonstrations.

activities.title: Coram's Fields
activities.ageRange: 0-16 (adults only allowed if accompanying a child)
activities.description: Seven acres dedicated entirely to children, with an adventure playground, sand pits, a paddling pool (summer months), and a small city farm.
activities.whyItWorks: Lots of space to run around and play. City farm with animals to see.

transport.fromHackney: Tube to Russell Square or Holborn.
transport.tip: Adults only allowed if accompanying a child.

activities.title: Golders Hill Park Zoo
activities.description: Small zoo in Hampstead Heath, home to rare species of birds and animals.
activities.whyItWorks: Free entry and a chance to see animals up close. Wallabies, lemurs, and Scottish wildcat.

transport.tip: Combine with a visit to Hampstead Heath.

activities.title: British Museum
activities.description: Explore world history and culture, with family activity backpacks available.
activities.whyItWorks: Free entry and a chance to see fascinating artifacts from around the world. Activity backpacks and family trails.

transport.fromHackney: Tube to Tottenham Court Road or Holborn.
transport.tip: Book an entrance ticket in advance.

activities.title: V&A Museum
activities.description: Explore art, design, and culture from around the world.
activities.whyItWorks: Range of free activities for families to enjoy every day. The program is designed for all ages and encourages play and learning.

transport.tip: Check the website for family events.

activities.title: Horniman Museum and Gardens
activities.description: Explore natural history, musical instruments, and world cultures. Gardens with a sound garden, animal walk, and views of London.
activities.whyItWorks: Lots to see and do both indoors and outdoors. Gardens perfect for running around. Family Craft Saturdays but not on 28 March.

transport.fromHackney: Overground to Forest Hill, then bus or walk.
transport.tip: Check for special events and activities for children.

activities.title: Easter Egg Hunt at Ham House and Garden
activities.description: Enjoy fun activities, game stations and an exciting egg trail through this glorious garden.
activities.whyItWorks: Outdoor fun with a trail and activities, perfect for a 3-year-old.

transport.fromHackney: Tube and train to Richmond, then bus or walk.
transport.tip: Book tickets in advance.

activities.title: Zoonormous Egg Hunt at London Zoo
activities.description: Wander past giraffes, lions, monkeys and more incredible wildlife as you search for hidden eggs on a special Easter egg hunt.
activities.whyItWorks: Animals and an egg hunt, a great combination for a toddler.

transport.fromHackney: Tube to Camden Town or Regent's Park.
transport.tip: Book tickets in advance.

activities.title: Lindt Gold Bunny Hunt at Hampton Court Palace
activities.description: Roam around the gardens and find hidden Lindt Gold Bunny statues to win a chocolate treat.
activities.whyItWorks: Outdoor fun with a trail and a chocolate treat at the end.

transport.tip: Book tickets in advance.

activities.title: Easter Eggsplorers at Hobbledown Heath
activities.description: Giant Easter egg trail, meet the Easter Bunny, indoor playbarn, and zoo animals.
activities.whyItWorks: Lots of activities to keep a 3-year-old entertained, both indoors and outdoors.

transport.fromHackney: Tube and train to Feltham, then bus.
transport.tip: Book tickets in advance for a discount.

activities.title: Kew Gardens - Octonauts Above and Beyond
activities.description: Join the Octonauts on an exciting outdoor mission at Kew Gardens. An interactive trail that invites young explorers to complete challenges, discover facts and learn how to protect our planet.
activities.whyItWorks: Interactive and educational, with plenty of space to run around.

transport.tip: Pack a picnic to enjoy in the gardens.

activities.title: The Very Hungry Caterpillar Trail at Walthamstow Wetlands
activities.description: Discover a variety of illustrated animals nestled amongst the blooming habitats of the reserve, identify the letter on each one and complete the secret word in the activity booklet.
activities.whyItWorks: Outdoor trail, engaging with nature and discovery

transport.tip: Check for special events and activities for children.

activities.title: Royal Mews Easter Egg Expedition
activities.description: Follow an Easter trail around the working stables at Buckingham Palace. Look out for clues as you explore the historic carriages and courtyard.
activities.whyItWorks: Easter themed trail to keep them engaged, exploring historic carriages.

transport.fromHackney: Tube to Victoria or Green Park
transport.tip: Book tickets in advance
